src: This project is aimed at the Sultanate of Oman and offers the ability to book appointments at women's beauty salons or request hairdressers to come to your home. Additionally, each salon has an online store to sell beauty products
ja: オマーン向けのプロジェクトで、女性向け美容サロンの予約やヘアドレッサーの出張依頼が可能。各サロンには美容製品を販売するオンラインストアも搭載
